creator: delphij@delphij.net
text:
Hi,

I have just tried with my 7.0-CURRENT (less v406) with no problem, does 
this happen *only* with less versions prior to, and not including 406? 
If that's the case I think 6.3-RELEASE (6-STABLE) won't have this 
problem, because we have MFC'ed v406 back to RELENG_6 some weeks ago.

Cheers,
